_meta.purpose: LIVE-corpus probe for epistemology v0.3.0-pre.1 false_equivalence_levelling detector. Companion to synthesis probe test-corpus/false-equivalence-2026-05-10/.
_meta.synthesis_flag: POSITIVE-CLASS-LIVE — verbatim sentences extracted from real articles via WebFetch. Test author chose URLs (URL-selection-bias acknowledged in PRE-REGISTRATION); did NOT author the resulting text. Negative class includes mix of live extractions + 2 Federalist verbatim short quotes (public domain).
_meta.url_selection_bias: EN positives drawn from sites known by genre to use FE/uniparty rhetoric (Greenwald Substack, CounterPunch). EN negatives from analytical sources (Reason policy critique, Brookings, Federalist Papers). RU corpus is sparse — Vedomosti + AIF surfaced no FE-positives in fetched columns; included as negatives only.
_meta.limitations: Reddit r/Centrism blocked by Claude Code CSP (would have been densest live source for exact-lexical 'both sides equally' framing). RU live positives missing — none found in fetched op-ed pages. Corpus is op-ed-leaning, EN-heavy.

entries.text: Both the Democrats and the Republicans are vested in this machine and are funded by billionaires.
entries.notes: FE-spirit. Lexical: «Both X and Y are vested» — pattern requires «both (sides|parties|teams|camps) (are )? (equally|just as) (bad|good|wrong|guilty)». Detector likely MISS — names parties instead of using abstract «sides/parties».

entries.text: The odd that the political establishment will initiate the move to replace neo-liberalism or even overhaul it are virtually non-existent.
entries.notes: FE-spirit (political-establishment leveling). No detector marker. Likely MISS.

entries.text: Apparently, both parties are dominated by war pigs.
entries.notes: FE-spirit. Lexical: «both parties are dominated by» — pattern requires «equally|just as» + «bad|good|wrong|guilty». Detector likely MISS.

entries.text: elected officials who purport to oppose domestic warrantless spying when the other party is in the White House typically change their minds once their party is in power.
entries.notes: FE-spirit (uniparty behavioral pattern across parties). No detector marker. Likely MISS.

entries.text: as Trump, Mike Johnson, Nancy Pelosi, and so many others have proven, their steadfast opposition magically transforms into vehement support once they ascend to power.
entries.notes: FE-spirit (cross-party behavioral collapse). No detector marker. Likely MISS.

entries.text: Trump on Monday demanded that FISA be fully renewed: yet again, with no reforms, safeguards, or limits of any kind.
entries.notes: FE-spirit (per article framing of Trump joining Obama+Biden in identical demand). Sentence alone is single-actor critique without explicit leveling words. Likely MISS.

entries.text: The Dissident Right rejects mutual forbearance in favor of a 'will-to-power' political approach and cannot save America's culture by sacrificing its creed.
entries.notes: Substantive ideological critique without leveling rhetoric.

entries.text: Contra AOC, there are makers and moochers on every rung of the income ladder.
entries.notes: Distinction-making argument across income classes. Should NOT fire.

entries.text: Wall Street firms see new customers. Progressives see expanded government involvement in retirement. Some conservatives see a backdoor route to Social Security privatization.
entries.notes: Multi-perspective enumeration — three distinct stakeholder views, NOT leveling. FP stress-test.

entries.text: The relationship has stabilized since the two leaders met last November, but it remains fragile—defined more by an absence of friction than any affirmative agenda.
entries.notes: Substantive analytical observation about US-China dynamics.

entries.text: Both leaders will likely announce Chinese purchases of American products, such as Boeing airplanes and agricultural goods.
entries.notes: «Both leaders will likely announce» — pattern requires (sides|parties|teams|camps), not «leaders». Should NOT fire — confirms pattern is correctly narrow.

entries.text: A weak Democratic Party opened the gates for the Republican Party in 2024, and they haven't made inroads since.
Ambition must be made to counteract ambition.
entries.notes: Federalist No. 51, public domain. Substantive comparison principle. Should NOT fire.

entries.text: The remedy for this inconveniency is to divide the legislature into different branches.
Лица, пытающиеся захватить российские активы, являются ворами и жуликами.
entries.notes: Substantive characterization, не leveling. Не должно fire.

entries.text: Страны ЕС не хотят становиться соучастниками этого воровства.
Уровень отношений между странами БРИКС системно растет.
entries.notes: Substantive analytical comparison BRICS vs West.

entries.text: Фактическое поражение в самими же начатой войне продемонстрировало глубину раскола между различными частями некогда единого западного мира.
entries.notes: Distinction-making (разные части западного мира). Не должно fire.
